purpose: Measure triggering accuracy: fire on policy/compliance-gate requests for Azure Terraform; defer to the reachability analyzer, the generator, and audit-mapping skills. Run with the ai-evaluation-harness.

should_trigger.prompt: Add a Checkov + OPA policy gate to our Terraform pipeline so misconfigs block the PR.
Write a Conftest rule that denies any VNet outside eastus2/westus2 and requires an environment tag.
How do I scan the terraform plan JSON for public storage accounts and missing TLS before merge?
We need a compliance gate on generated Terraform — encryption, tagging, approved regions.
should_trigger.why: core: broad compliance surface in the generate pipeline

should_trigger.prompt: Block this Terraform if it creates a public IP on a sensitive subnet, as a CI policy.
should_trigger.why: core: policy gate (note: reachability is a separate gate)

should_not_trigger.prompt: Is this NSG actually reachable from the internet across our peering and routes?
Generate the Terraform for a new hub-and-spoke topology from this intent.
Map our findings to SOC 2 and ISO 27001 controls for the auditor.
Forecast the cost of adding an Azure Firewall.
Add a Checkov policy gate to our AWS CloudFormation.

notes: Hard boundary: policy/compliance RULES (this skill) vs reachability/exposure PATHS (analysis skill). The should_not_trigger #1 (reachability) is the most likely leak.
